summary: TWO_COLUMN: √23 = [4; 1, 3, 1, 8, ...] with period 4. LEFT axes with YELLOW convergents p_k/q_k via always_redraw dots + connecting path approaching dashed RED √23 reference. ValueTracker k_tr advances k=0..9. RIGHT shows expansion strip with GREEN highlight on active term + live p_k, q_k, ratio, and |error| shrinking 1e-7.
